title: cordula × shipwayae
intro: Cordula × shipwayae, also known as a hybrid of Cordia and Gmelina species, is a plant used in traditional medicine due to its unique properties. The plant contains cordia dravidica, which has been found to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cordula × shipwayae include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and exhibit immune-boosting properties. Herbal preparations of Cordula × shipwayae can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
intro_study: According to "Natural products and bioprospecting", Cordula × shipwayae benefits include exhibiting antifungal, larvicidal, antileishmanial, anti-inflammatory, antibiofilm, antimycobacterial, antioxidant, antimalarial, neuroinhibitory, and hemolytic activities, indicating potential utility in the development of new drugs.
